item.title: It's yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
i'm liking the toasting level on that bad boy
again?
dedication
ok, but why is it in bed with a laptop/remote nearby?
yes. i forgot until now.. kinda metal
so what am i so afraid of?
i saw this very long ago but i remember enjoying it
wait what
dope
i used to go pretty heavy on the borat myself
iphone 6-8 look pretty similar
mmm hmm
yes
i wanted to scribble out doomscroll and put 'harvest memes' but more or less same thing
life hack
that's just what they'll do
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Hard work paid off
item.description: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07509-7 (I am the lead author of one and a co-author on the other.) This is big for a number of reasons. It shows the direction Maya archaeology is heading. It helps the students at my university. It will mean increased attention at the upcoming SAA Conference in Denver 2025. It may provide better opportunities for research funding. And... it is reassurance my hard work over the years is beneficial to people. Sorry, but I am super proud and have no one to tell so I hope you all don't mind a little boast. Yay!
item.dc:creator: buttmike

item.title: Amazing and very touching story
item.description: Jesse Owens of USA winning gold for the long jump in the summer Olympics in Nazi Germany, 1936.⁣ ⁣ The man saluting behind Owens is Lutz Long, a German who shared training tips with Owens and was the first to openly congratulate him after his final jump in full view of Hitler. After the Olympics, the two kept in touch via mail. Below is Long’s last letter to Owens while he was stationed with the German Army in North Africa during World War 2. Long was later killed in action during the allied invasion of Sicily in 1943.⁣ ⁣ “I am here, Jesse, where it seems there is only the dry sand and the wet blood. I do not fear so much for myself, my friend Jesse, I fear for my woman who is home, and my young son Karl, who has never really known his father.⁣ ⁣ My heart tells me, if I be honest with you, that this is the last letter I shall ever write. If it is so, I ask you something. It is a something so very important to me. It is you go to Germany when this war done, someday find my Karl, and tell him about his father. Tell him, Jesse, what times were like when we not separated by war. I am saying—tell him how things can be between men on this earth.⁣ ⁣ If you do this something for me, this thing that I need the most to know will be done, I do something for you, now. I tell you something I know you want to hear. And it is true.⁣ ⁣ That hour in Berlin when I first spoke to you, when you had your knee upon the ground, I knew that you were in prayer.⁣ ⁣ Then I not know how I know. Now I do. I know it is never by chance that we come together. I come to you that hour in 1936 for purpose more than der Berliner Olympiade.⁣ ⁣ And you, I believe, will read this letter, while it should not be possible to reach you ever, for purpose more even than our friendship.⁣ ⁣ I believe this shall come about because I think now that God will make it come about. This is what I have to tell you, Jesse.⁣ ⁣ I think I might believe in God.⁣ And I pray to him that, even while it should not be possible for this to reach you ever, these words I write will still be read by you.⁣ ⁣ Your brother,⁣ Luz” Owens travelled to Germany to meet Kai Long…and he later served as Kai Long’s best man at his wedding.’
item.dc:creator: kickarr

item.title: My heart will go on
item.dc:creator: karl4000

item.title: Community coming together!
item.description: My next door neighbor had a heart attack a few weeks ago. A couple days ago I saw him out trying to mow his lawn, but he gave up after 2 or three passes. Ended up having to go back to the hospital. I didn’t know he was sick until a few days ago. So, I figured… today it finally isn’t raining… why not sneak over and help out. He’ll never know, (and definitely wouldn’t check this site nor know this is my profile) so since I recently fixed my mower I figured what the hell! Within about 5-10 minutes, neighbors from 3 other houses showed up with mowers, rakes, weed whackers, and pruning sheers! I couldn’t believe it! No way Wallace isn’t going to find out now, but the man just had a heart attack! How could I not step up to help!? But seriously, 3 households, 7 people total, all just… showed up to help! Don’t praise me, at all! Praise the neighborhood for spotting this! A couple of them mentioned they had been concerned as well. They knew he had a heart attack and had seen his property falling a bit into disrepair, just weren’t positive of it was the right thing to do. 88°F out, sweating wildly and all of a sudden I am surrounded by people I either barely know or didn’t know at all helping a nice guy in need (Wallace, not me… I’m a bad guy). Today was a good day. Very proud of them all. A little annoyed at myself for getting caught. I do my best to never let people catch me doing anything good for others. (I can talk about it here because none of you know me personally).
item.dc:creator: Hellstorm99

item.title: I have no words...
item.description: https://www.cnn.com/2024/06/12/us/big-5-sporting-goods-shooting-washington/index.html This is near where I live. Literally worked half a mile from this place. These crazy people trying to "Be the hero" in their demented, self absorbed world where they are the focus. Its military porn. This guy was part of an incident 2 years ago where he almost shot a bicyclist for...riding his bike with a metal part that apparently looked like a gun to this guy. The video, in this case, seems to contradict much of what he says in his defense. Unless something comes out that really flips the circumstances here, I hope this guy gets thrown away for life. Let him rot in a hole for this.
item.dc:creator: Grurim

item.title: Day 3 of Making BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/@yuzupyon Today we tackle the jewelry craft and priming previous pieces, on Day 4 I'll start sewing the dress with the final fabric :D Day 5 & 6 will be painting and wig making then I think we should be done ? :) we'll see, always good to keep room for last minute finishes. I wish you all a great day, hope you enjoy this post and thank you for the support on previous ones as well! If you are interested to see the process day to day, I do post regularly in my Instagram story https://instagram.com/yuzu.pyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon
